hero.heading: We don't teach English. We build Bilingual Thinkers.
hero.differentiator: Most English programs teach children what to say. DODO teaches them how to think — then say it, then write it. We are the only live, high-touch program that trains the full Read → Think → Speak → Write loop, for families who live between two languages.
hero.position: Live, Navigator-led sessions. Lexile-measured literacy growth. For Chinese-speaking diaspora families in Canada and the US.
hero.cities_label: Serving Vancouver · Richmond BC · Markham · Toronto · San Francisco Bay Area · Los Angeles

name.heading: DODO is not named after the extinct bird.
name.subheading: It is named after the most fundamental act of language mastery: doing the work — twice, in two languages, at every level.

doEnglish.label: English
doEnglish.body: The new world. The academic language. The language of possibility and future belonging.
doEnglish.detail: Every session, every Navigator, every Lexile target — this DO is the destination. The language your child will lead in.

doMotherTongue.label: 母语
doMotherTongue.body: The emotional core. The first lens. The language through which the world first made sense.
doMotherTongue.detail: Not a language to leave behind — a cognitive foundation to leverage. The bilingual mind is not half of two things. It is twice one thing.

name.synthesis: DODO is what happens when a student stops translating and starts thinking — simultaneously — in both.

truths.heading: What we believe about language, learning, and your child.
truths.subheading: These are not marketing claims. They are the principles every Navigator works from, every session, with every student.

items.heading: Language is a thinking tool, not a performance skill.
items.body: Fluency without depth is noise. We train students to have something worth saying — and the precision to say it in two languages. A student who can perform English is not the same as a student who can wield it.

items.heading: The bilingual mind is a competitive advantage.
items.body: We don't treat bilingualism as a gap to close. We treat it as a cognitive superpower to develop. Every lesson builds the double-track mind — the student who leads in two registers simultaneously.

items.heading: Progress must be visible, measurable, and felt.
items.body: Parents invest in outcomes. Students invest in confidence. We measure both — with Lexile levels and 6+1 Trait writing assessments — and we make growth legible. The numbers are the proof.

who.heading: Three families. One real fear. One precise solution.
who.subheading: DODO is built for Chinese-speaking diaspora families at a specific moment — when their child's English needs to move beyond fluency and into academic leadership.

profiles.heading: My child speaks English but can't hold their own in class.
profiles.fear: Survival English and academic English are two different languages. Your child can order lunch and navigate the playground. But when the teacher asks them to argue a position in writing, the gap opens.
profiles.solve: We close the gap between survival English and academic fluency. The Loop gives them the vocabulary depth, the reading stamina, and the writing precision their classroom demands.

profiles.heading: My child will fall behind the moment they land.
profiles.fear: You've seen it happen to other families. The first semester is lost to adjustment. Your child spends a year catching up instead of moving ahead. You don't want that.
profiles.solve: We build academic language infrastructure before arrival. A student who lands at Lexile 780 with 6+1 Trait writing skills doesn't catch up — they start at the front.

profiles.heading: My child will be outcompeted by truly bilingual peers.
profiles.fear: You see the next generation of globally mobile talent. You know that operational English is not enough. Your child needs the double-track mind that sets them apart in university admissions and beyond.
profiles.solve: We develop the cognitive identity that makes the difference — a student whose thinking is genuinely bilingual, not translated. That is the competitive advantage that compounds.

mission.heading: We exist for families who have crossed borders — or are about to.
mission.differentiator_quote: Bilingual children don't have half a language twice. They have twice a mind.

claims.label: From Lexile baseline to measurable exit growth — every student, every time.
Average reading growth in 16 weeks, measured by Lexile re-assessment.
Average 6+1 Trait score improvement from entry to exit evaluation.

closing.heading: The diagnostic consultation is where we find out exactly where your child is.
closing.body: Not where their school says they are. We measure their Lexile level, identify the specific gap, and tell you exactly what the first 16 weeks looks like for a student exactly like yours.
